character.name: 도적 (Bandit)
character.prompt: Cute chibi-style ancient Chinese bandit rogue. Wearing dark grey and black light clothing with a face mask covering lower face. Holding a short dagger. Sneaky and agile appearance. Adorable chibi proportions.
